title: GAIA
description: Evaluate a multi-turn assistant agent against GAIA-style general assistant tasks.
baseline_summary: A placeholder GAIA adapter that never emits a tool action.
prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. Preserve def step(turn, runtime) and optionally def init_episode(episode). Each turn should update state, reason over the current observation, and emit an `act(command)` tool call only when it has a concrete next move.

tools.name: act
tools.description: Submit one GAIA action to the underlying benchmark runtime.

command.description: One textual action for the current turn.

tools.name: complete
tools.description: Declare the task complete and optionally include a final answer.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher successful-task rate is better across GAIA multi-turn tasks.
